projectDescription: A modern Android TV media player that integrates with the Stremio addon ecosystem for content discovery, source resolution, and TV-optimized playback.
keyFeatures: Stremio addon ecosystem integration for content discovery and stream resolution
Dual-engine playback with ExoPlayer and MPV
Debrid service support (Torbox, Premiumize, Real-Debrid) with cached torrent resolution
Dolby Vision Profile 7 to 8.1 transcoding via native libdovi bridge
Android TV-first UI built with Jetpack Compose and TV Material3
Cloud library sync via Supabase with multi-profile support
Trakt integration for watch progress scrobbling and lists
Stream badge system with customizable filtering rules
Essential and Advanced experience modes for new vs. power users
QR-based add-on management from a mobile phone
Auto-play next episode with binge-group support
Skip intro detection via Anime-Skip integration
P2P torrent streaming with consent-gated BitTorrent support
Frame-rate matching and display mode switching for HDR/Dolby Vision content
publicApiSurface: Screen.Home, Screen.Search, Screen.Library, Screen.Addon, Screen.Settings — root navigation destinations
Screen.Detail.createRoute(itemId, itemType, addonBaseUrl?, ...) — content detail navigation
Screen.Stream.createRoute(videoId, contentType, title, ...) — stream selection navigation
Screen.Player.createRoute(streamUrl, title, ...) — player launch route
DebridProviders.all(), DebridProviders.visible(), DebridProviders.byId(id) — debrid provider registry
DebridProviders.configuredServices(settings), DebridProviders.preferredResolverService(settings) — active debrid services
Stream.getStreamUrl(), Stream.isTorrent(), Stream.isDirectDebrid(), Stream.isYouTube() — stream type resolution
Stream.getDisplayName(), Stream.stableKey() — stream display helpers
AddonStreams(addonName, addonLogo, streams) — grouped stream model
Addon(id, name, baseUrl, catalogs, types, resources, ...) — addon manifest model
CatalogDescriptor(type, id, name, extra, showInHome) — catalog row descriptor
ExperienceMode.ESSENTIAL / ExperienceMode.ADVANCED — app complexity mode enum
DebridProvider(id, displayName, shortName, authMethod, capabilities) — debrid provider descriptor
DebridProviderCapability.ClientResolve / LocalTorrentCacheCheck / LocalTorrentResolve / CloudLibrary — capability flags
StreamBadge(name, imageURL, tagColor, tagStyle, textColor, borderColor) — stream label model
StreamBadgePresentation.apply(groups) — badge application pipeline
AppFeaturePolicy.pluginsEnabled, inAppUpdatesEnabled, inAppTrailerPlaybackEnabled — build flavor feature gates
AddonWebConfigMode.FULL / ADDONS_ONLY / COLLECTIONS_ONLY — web phone config access levels
PlayerPreference.Internal / External / Ask — player selection preference
StreamAutoPlayMode.MANUAL / FIRST_STREAM — auto-play stream selection modes
